@@ -0,0 +1,78 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "keda-4740-scaledjobs-keda-sh-crd-is-too-long",
+  "missionClass": "fixer",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "keda: scaledjobs.keda.sh CRD is too long.",
+    "description": "scaledjobs.keda.sh CRD is too long.. This issue affects 7+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify keda troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your keda deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n keda -l app.kubernetes.io/name=keda\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=keda -n keda --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review keda configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant keda configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n keda -l app.kubernetes.io/name=keda\nkubectl get configmap -n keda -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=keda\n```\n### Report\n\nWhen I install KEDA with kubectl, it returns a message like this:\nThe CustomResourceDefinition \"scaledjobs.keda.sh\" is invalid: metadata.annotations: Too long: must have at most 262144 bytes\n\n### Expected"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for scaledjobs.keda.sh CRD is too long.",
+        "description": "does `kubectl apply --server-side -f ...` help with the problem?\n```yaml\n……\n\n2023-06-27T09:38:32Z    ERROR   controller-runtime.source.EventHandler  if kind is a CRD, it should be installed before calling Start   {\"kind\": \"ScaledJob.keda.sh\", \"error\": \"no matches for kind \\\"ScaledJob\\\" in version \\\"keda.sh/v1alpha1\\\"\"}\nsigs.k8s.io/controller-runtime/pkg/internal/source.(*Kind).Start.func1.1\n        /workspace/vendor/sigs.k8s.io/controller-runtime/pkg/internal/source/kind.go:63\nk8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/util/wait.loopConditionUntilContext.func1\n        /workspace/vendor/k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/util/wait/loop.go:62\nk8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/util/wait.loopConditionUntilCo\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm scaledjobs.keda.sh CRD is too long. is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=keda -n keda --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n keda --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "does `kubectl apply --server-side -f ...` help with the problem?",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "……\n\n2023-06-27T09:38:32Z    ERROR   controller-runtime.source.EventHandler  if kind is a CRD, it should be installed before calling Start   {\"kind\": \"ScaledJob.keda.sh\", \"error\": \"no matches for kind \\\"ScaledJob\\\" in version \\\"keda.sh/v1alpha1\\\"\"}\nsigs.k8s.io/controller-runtime/pkg/internal/source.(*Kind).Start.func1.1\n        /workspace/vendor/sigs.k8s.io/controller-runtime/pkg/internal/source/kind.go:63\nk8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/util/wait.loopConditionUntilContext.func1\n        /workspace/vendor/k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/util/wait/loop.go:62\nk8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/util/wait.loopConditionUntilContext\n        /workspace/vendor/k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/util/wait/loop.go:63\nk8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/util/wait.PollUntilContextCancel\n        /workspace/vendor/k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/util/wait/poll.g",
+        "\"syncPolicy\" = {\n  \"syncOptions\" = [\n    \"ServerSideApply=true\"\n  ]\n}",
+        "apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1\nkind: Application\nmetadata:\n  name: keda\n  namespace: argocd\nspec:\n  syncPolicy:\n    syncOptions:\n    - ServerSideApply=true\n(...)"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "keda",
+      "graduated",
+      "app-definition",
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "keda"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [
+      "Customresourcedefinition"
+    ],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "graduated",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/kedacore/keda/issues/4740",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/kedacore/keda"
+    },
+    "reactions": 7,
+    "comments": 7,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with keda installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-04-01T06:39:37.417Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}
